title: Pesktda Xenobotanical Garden
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Image}} {{Location |image= |name=Pesktda Xenobotanical Garden |created= |destroyed=[[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' |type= |location=[[Pesktda]], [[Garqi]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' |terrain= |fauna= |flora=*[[Bafforr tree]] *[[Greel tree]]''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' *[[Namana]] *[[Senoti]] *[[Tree of wisdom|Wisdom-tree]] |interest= |affiliation=[[Garqi Agricultural University]] }} {{Quote|I've heard the Pesktda Xenobotanical Garden is worth seeing.''"
"''Yeah, well, don't figure you're going to get time to read all the exhibit signs.|[[Ganner Rhysode]] and Corran Horn|''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]''}} The '''Pesktda Xenobotanical Garden''' was a garden located in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Pesktda]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]]. A set of [[bafforr tree]]s was located at the gardens. When the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Battle of Garqi|attacked Garqi]], the local defenders and the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] made a stand at the gardens. The battle was short, though, as the bafforr trees soon unleashed pollen that attacked the [[Warrior caste|warriors]]' [[Vonduun Skerr Kyrric|vonduun crab armor]]. To prevent the Yuuzhan Vong from learning of bafforr pollen's effects on Yuuzhan Vong armor, [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] ordered the gardens to be burned, but he knew it was just a matter of time before the Yuuzhan Vong [[Battle of Ithor|attacked]] [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]. {{Loc-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' {{1st}} *[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin (abridged audiobook)|''The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin'' abridged audiobook]] ==Sources== *''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' *''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Xenobotanischer Garten von Pesktda |es=Jardín Xenobotánico Pesktda }} [[Category:Garqi locations]] [[Category:Parks and gardens]]
